short_description: Creates or loads validation/test data for model assessment
long_description:
Validation/testing data is essential for unbiased assessment of model performance. This step creates validation sets by splitting calibration data or loads external validation data.

Creating Validation Sets from Calibration Data:

1. Random Splitting
   - Randomly selects samples for validation
   - Fastest and simplest approach
   - Suitable for large, diverse datasets
   - May not ensure representative distribution

2. Stratified Random Splitting
   - Random selection that preserves class proportions in both sets
   - Requires class data to be available
   - Use the Stratification Class Layer to choose which class column to stratify on

3. Kennard-Stone Algorithm
   - Selects samples that span the data space
   - Ensures good representation of data range
   - Better for small or clustered datasets
   - More computationally expensive

4. Stratified Kennard-Stone
   - Applies Kennard-Stone class by class
   - Preserves class proportions while maximizing spread within each class
   - Requires class data to be available
   - Use the Stratification Class Layer to choose which class column to stratify on

5. File-Based Selection
   - Uses external index file for sample selection
   - Allows custom selection criteria
   - Requires pre-prepared selection file

Calibration Proportion:
- Typical value: 0.7 (70% calibration, 30% validation)
- Larger sets: can use 0.8-0.9 for better calibration
- Smaller datasets: may use 0.6-0.7 for more validation samples

Loading External Validation Sets:
- Load completely independent validation data
- Useful for temporal or spatial validation
- Provides most realistic performance estimate
- Separate X and Y files required
- Optional sample labels file

Best Practices:
- Validation set should be independent of calibration
- Ensure both sets cover similar data ranges
- Document how validation sets were selected
- Use appropriate set size for statistical reliability

Usage:
- Create internal set OR load external set
- Both can be used simultaneously for comprehensive validation
- Settings applied automatically during model building.

layout.name: validation_mode
layout.label: Validation Set Mode
layout.tooltip: Choose whether to load external validation data or create it from calibration data

layout.name: creationMethod
layout.label: Creation Method
layout.tooltip: Random: random selection. Kennard-Stone: diversity-based. File: use external selection indices

layout.name: calProportion
layout.label: Calibration Proportion (0-1)
layout.tooltip: Fraction of data for calibration (0.7 = 70% cal, 30% val)

layout.name: random_seed
layout.label: Random Seed (optional)
layout.tooltip: Seed used for reproducible random splits (same seed = same selection)

layout.name: stratify_layer
layout.label: Stratification Class Layer
layout.tooltip: 1-based column index of the class data matrix used for stratification (1 = first class layer)

layout.name: selection_file
layout.label: Selection File (if using 'file' method)
layout.tooltip: File with sample indices/identifiers for selection

layout.name: X_val_path
layout.label: X Test Data File
layout.tooltip: Instrumental data to be used with the model for validation/testing

layout.name: Y_val_path
layout.label: Y Test Data File
layout.tooltip: External validation response file

layout.name: val_labels_path
layout.label: Validation Sample Labels File (optional)
layout.tooltip: Labels for external validation samples

layout.name: cdata_path
layout.label: Validation Classification Data File
layout.tooltip: Classification file for external validation: one sample per row. Supports single label or multi-layer labels (comma/tab/space separated columns).

layout.name: X_cal
layout.label: X Calibration Data
layout.tooltip: Routed from previous function output

layout.name: Y_cal
layout.label: Y Calibration Data
layout.tooltip: Routed from previous function output

layout.name: smp_cal
layout.label: Calibration Sample Labels
layout.tooltip: Routed from previous function output

layout.name: class_data_cal
layout.label: Calibration Classification Data
layout.tooltip: Routed from previous function output

layout.name: cal_metadata
layout.label: Calibration Sample Metadata
layout.tooltip: Routed metadata dictionary from Load Data output

layout.name: cal_s_mask
layout.label: Calibration Sample Mask
layout.tooltip: Boolean mask routed from Load Data indicating real vs padded sample values

layout.name: d_specs_separator
layout.label: Data Separator
layout.tooltip: Inherited from Load Data. Default is Auto detect (comma/tab/space).

layout.name: d_specs_headlines
layout.label: Number of Header Rows
layout.tooltip: Inherited from Load Data. Leave empty to auto-detect header rows.

layout.name: d_specs_headcolumns
layout.label: Number of Header Columns
layout.tooltip: Inherited from Load Data. Leave empty to auto-detect leading header columns.

layout.name: d_specs_type
layout.label: Data Type
layout.tooltip: Inherited from Load Data. Default is Auto detect.

layout.name: d_specs_dimensions
layout.label: Data Dimensions
layout.tooltip: Automatically inherited from Load Data function

layout.name: s_padding_type
layout.label: Sample Padding Type
layout.tooltip: Inherited from Load Data. Used when nway>=2 validation samples require padding.

layout.name: y_labels_from_file
layout.label: Y Labels from File
layout.tooltip: Inherited from Load Data. Uses first Y-file row as labels and skips it from Y values.

layout.name: y_labels
layout.label: Y Labels
layout.tooltip: Inherited from Load Data. Manual Y labels separated by comma, tab, or spaces.

layout.name: nway_flag
layout.label: Data Dimensionality
layout.tooltip: Automatically inherited from Load Data function

layout.name: reshape_order
layout.label: Reshape Order (Multiway)
layout.tooltip: Automatically inherited from Load Data function

sections.short_description: Displays X Validation Data as a table in the analysis section.
sections.long_description: This section presents 'X Validation Data' in tabular form. Use this view to review numeric values, compare rows/columns, and inspect detailed outputs for this section.

sections.short_description: Displays Validation Spectral Data Overview (Per sample) as a line graph in the analysis section.
sections.long_description: This section visualizes 'Validation Spectral Data Overview (Per sample)' using a line graph. Use this view to inspect patterns, compare values, and interpret the section-specific analysis output.

sections.title: Scatter Plot of Validation X Data
sections.short_description: Displays Validation Data Overview as a scatter graph in the analysis section.
sections.long_description: This section visualizes 'Validation Data Overview' using a scatter graph. Use this view to inspect patterns, compare values, and interpret the section-specific analysis output.

pages.title: Data Overview - Validation Second Order Data

sections.short_description: Displays Single Validation Sample Slice as a table in the analysis section.
sections.long_description: This section presents 'Single Validation Sample Slice' in tabular form. Use this view to review numeric values, compare rows/columns, and inspect detailed outputs for this section.

sections.short_description: Displays Validation Spectral Data Heatmap as a contour graph in the analysis section.
sections.long_description: This section visualizes 'Validation Spectral Data Heatmap' using a contour graph. Use this view to inspect patterns, compare values, and interpret the section-specific analysis output.

sections.short_description: Displays Validation Spectral Data 3D Surface as a 3d_surf graph in the analysis section.
sections.long_description: This section visualizes 'Validation Spectral Data 3D Surface' using a 3d_surf graph. Use this view to inspect patterns, compare values, and interpret the section-specific analysis output.

sections.short_description: Displays Validation Spectral Data Heatmap (4D+) as a heatmap graph in the analysis section.
sections.long_description: This section visualizes 'Validation Spectral Data Heatmap (4D+)' using a heatmap graph. Use this view to inspect patterns, compare values, and interpret the section-specific analysis output.

sections.short_description: Displays Validation Spectral Data Heatmap (4D+) as a heatmap graph in the analysis section.
sections.long_description: This section visualizes 'Validation Spectral Data Heatmap (4D+)' using a heatmap graph. Use this view to inspect patterns, compare values, and interpret the section-specific analysis output.

sections.short_description: Displays all validation spectra coloured by class as a line graph in the analysis section.
sections.long_description: This section visualizes all loaded validation spectra simultaneously. Lines are coloured by class value using the selected colormap settings. Class data must be loaded for class-driven styling to appear.

config.title: Validation Data Load Report

sections.short_description: Displays a compact text report about loaded validation data dimensions and counts.
sections.long_description: This section provides a runtime text summary including number of loaded validation samples, dimensionality, overall size, shape, and availability of labels/targets.

sections.short_description: Lists sample labels selected for calibration when creating a validation split.
sections.long_description: This section lists all sample labels assigned to the calibration subset by the selected split method.

sections.short_description: Lists sample labels selected for validation when creating a validation split.
sections.long_description: This section lists all sample labels assigned to the validation subset by the selected split method.
